query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: HMRC confirms 26p per mile rule for petrol drivers in force from Monday
articles.description: HMRC has confirmed fuel advisory rates for petrol, diesel and EV motorists on Monday, June 1, after a quarterly update kicked in.

articles.title: Nifty Bank down 1%; Why SBI, ICICI Bank, Axis Bank, PNB shares fell today
articles.description: Bank stocks fell on Monday, June 1, on rising oil prices and bond yields. Analysts, however, remain positive on the sector outlook on healthy credit growth outlook

articles.title: Will Bitcoin lose $72K support as it enters a bearish channel amid ETF outflows?
articles.description: Bitcoin nears key $72K support after $1.42B in weekly ETF outflows, while rising oil prices and Middle East tensions weigh on sentiment.

articles.title: Florida gas prices affect fishing, boating as fuel prices remain high
articles.description: Boaters, recreational anglers and charter captains have felt the pinch at the pump, with those making their money on the water feeling it the most.

articles.title: From Fronx Hybrid to Corolla Cross: Maruti and Toyota likely to launch THESE hybrid cars in India
articles.description: Hybrid cars are becoming increasingly popular in India. They offer better fuel efficiency than regular petrol cars and do not need to be charged like EVs.

articles.title: M&M shares fall 2% despite May sales beating estimates; rising crude weighs
articles.description: The weakness in the stock was largely attributed to global cues after crude oil prices moved higher.

articles.title: They Voted for Trump. Here’s How They Feel About High Gas Prices.
articles.description: With the midterm elections five months away, many Americans who backed President Trump are wrestling with pain at the pump and the war in Iran.

articles.title: Diesel-isobutanol blending mandate likely this year. How will it impact your diesel SUV
articles.description: The Indian government believes isobutanol blending in diesel will have a far greater impact on India's energy security than ethanol blending in petrol.

articles.title: 45-litre tank, 52 litres of petrol: Kanpur car owner alleges fuel pump scam
articles.description: In a video, the car owner claimed that the petrol pump billed him for 52 litres of petrol in a 45-litre tank, prompting him to urge the local administration to investigate the alleged scam.

articles.title: European Shares Dip Amid Middle East Tensions and M&A Buzz
articles.description: On Monday, European shares declined due to rising tensions in the Middle East, affecting hopes for a conflict resolution. Attention was also drawn to merger news involving easyJet and Universal Music Group. Crude oil prices surged; meanwhile, energy stocks rose as geopolitical conflicts intensified, impacting market movements.
